candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: A separate operating D&A line exists above EBIT, so it is not embedded in the selected COGS row 'Goods for resale'. However, the label does not indicate COGS/cost of sales specifically; it appears to be a general operating D&A line rather than merchandise cost D&A. To avoid misallocating and double counting, do not add it to COGS.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Goods for resale'. The visible D&A row is separate but not identified as COGS-related.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: This is a distinct operating D&A line above EBIT at the same level as the selected overhead rows ('Other external expenses', 'Personnel expenses', 'Other operating expenses'). It appears outside those selected XSGA component rows, so it should be added separately later. No more granular SG&A D&A component rows are shown, so use this summary row.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible assets

variables.notes: No separate above-EBIT R&D row is selected in XRD, and the visible D&A line is a standalone operating expense outside the chosen XSGA component bucket.
